root_text.sn24.17:1.2: “Kismiṁ nu kho, bhikkhave, sati, kiṁ upādāya, kiṁ abhinivissa evaṁ diṭṭhi uppajjati:
root_text.sn24.17:1.3: ‘hoti ca na ca hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇā’”ti?

translation_text.sn24.17:0.3: A Realized One Both Still Exists and No Longer Exists
translation_text.sn24.17:1.2: “Mendicants, when what exists, because of grasping what and insisting on what, does the view arise:
translation_text.sn24.17:1.3: ‘A realized one both still exists and no longer exists after death’?” …
